title: Countries Scramble to Shore Up Global Oil Supplies as Ships Are Attacked
summary_full: The United States and Israel launched more strikes against Iran, where crowds mourned military commanders killed in the war. Israel also bombed targets in Lebanon, where the death toll climbed.
